items.title: Internal vs external evaluation flow
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  fit["Fit clustering on X"] --> part["Cluster labels c"]
  part --> internal["Internal metrics\ninertia, silhouette"]
  part --> decision{"Ground-truth labels y?"}
  decision -->|no| report["Report internal scores + stability"]
  decision -->|yes| external["External metrics\nARI, NMI, homogeneity"]
  external --> report
items.caption: Internal metrics need only features and cluster assignments; external metrics additionally require reference labels.

items.title: Silhouette intuition for one point
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  point["point i"] --> a["a(i): mean dist\nto same cluster"]
  point --> b["b(i): mean dist\nto nearest other cluster"]
  a --> s["s(i) = (b - a) / max(a, b)"]
  b --> s
items.caption: High s(i) means the point is closer to its own cluster than to the nearest alternative.
